title: nasturtium officinale var. siifolium
intro: Nasturtium officinale var. siifolium, also known as watercress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is characterized by its peppery flavor and delicate, curly leaves. The medicinal properties of watercress include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of consuming watercress include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting eye health. Watercress can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as salads, smoothies, and teas, or used as a garnish in culinary dishes.
